system_prompt: You are an expert prompt engineer for AI video generation. Convert scene descriptions into motion-focused prompts for 3D anime style videos. Focus on smooth, natural movements that match Pixar-quality animation.

character.walking: walking naturally, smooth gait, gentle bobbing motion
character.running: running smoothly, dynamic movement, flowing hair and clothes
character.sitting: sitting down gracefully, smooth transition, natural pose
character.talking: speaking naturally, lip sync, expressive hand gestures
character.looking: turning head smoothly, natural eye movement, curious expression
character.fighting: dynamic combat movement, smooth action, powerful strikes
character.dancing: graceful dancing, fluid movement, rhythmic motion

camera.static: static camera, still shot, stable frame
camera.pan_left: smooth camera pan left, cinematic movement
camera.pan_right: smooth camera pan right, cinematic movement
camera.zoom_in: smooth slow zoom in, dramatic focus
camera.zoom_out: smooth slow zoom out, revealing shot
camera.orbit: orbit camera movement, rotating around subject

environment.wind: gentle wind blowing, hair and clothes moving softly
environment.fire: fire flickering, warm glow, dancing flames
environment.particles: floating particles, magical sparkles, dust motes

principles: Smooth easing: slow in, slow out for natural movement
Secondary motion: hair, clothes follow primary movement
Anticipation: slight wind-up before major actions
Follow through: continued motion after action stops
Overlap: different body parts move at different speeds

short.description: Single action, simple motion, one camera move

medium.description: Multiple actions, moderate complexity, character interaction

long.description: Complex sequence, multiple elements, scene transition

luma_kling.suffix: smooth animation, high quality, consistent motion

luma_ray.suffix: cinematic quality, smooth motion, Pixar style
